opinion.h4: LOCAL 182, INTERNATIONAL BROTHERHOOD OF TEAMSTERS, CHAUFFEURS, WAREHOUSEMEN & HELPERS OF AMERICA v. NATIONAL LABOR RELATIONS BOARD. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE SECOND CIRCUIT. No. 958. Decided March 10, 1969.
opinion.p: 401 F.2d 509, appeal dismissed and certiorari denied.
Solicitor General Griswold, Arnold Ordman, Dominick L. Manoli, and Norton J. Come for appellee.
The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for a writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
ABRAMS ET AL. v. WIETHE ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF OHIO. No. 961. Decided March 10, 1969.
The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for a writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
